---
title: "Social Sentiment & Financial Analytics Dashboard"
description: "3 interactive Tableau dashboards with NLP-driven sentiment analysis across 25 companies using RoBERTa and VADER, with custom financial metrics"
categories: [Tableau, Python, NLP, Data Visualization, Finance]
date: "2025-12-01"
image: "../../files/sentiment_thumb.png"
---

## Overview

Designed and built a **financial analytics platform** that bridges social media sentiment with stock market behavior. The system automates data collection, NLP-based sentiment scoring, and visualization — giving analysts an integrated view of how public discourse connects to price movements.

## Problem Statement

Analysts tracking equity markets lack a unified view of how social sentiment shifts relate to price volatility and volume anomalies. Manually aggregating and interpreting this signal at scale across multiple companies is infeasible.

## Approach

- Applied **RoBERTa** (transformer-based) and **VADER** (lexicon-based) NLP models to score sentiment from social data across **25 companies**
- Engineered custom financial metrics including **Volume Z-Score** and **Rolling Volatility** to surface abnormal market behavior
- Built **automated Tableau Prep workflows** for end-to-end data refresh without manual intervention
- Designed **3 interactive Tableau dashboards** for sentiment trends, price correlation, and anomaly detection

## Dashboards

| Dashboard | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| Sentiment Trends | Track sentiment polarity over time by company and sector |
| Price Correlation | Visualize lag relationships between sentiment shifts and price movement |
| Anomaly Detector | Surface volume and volatility anomalies aligned with sentiment spikes |

## Custom Metrics Engineered

- **Volume Z-Score** — Flags abnormal trading volume relative to historical baseline
- **Rolling Volatility** — Captures short-term price variance windows
- **Sentiment Momentum** — Tracks directional sentiment shift velocity

## Tech Stack

`Python` · `RoBERTa` · `VADER` · `Tableau` · `Tableau Prep` · `Pandas` · `NLP` · `Financial Analytics`
